creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Any clue when devel/llvm50 is going to be available in the ports? According to llvm.org schedule rc1 should've appeared a few days ago. devel/llvm-devel is currently too old to be of much use. 12.0-CURRENT has Clang 5.0 since base r321369, so it'd be nice to check LLVM 5.0 fallout via Mesa, Beignet, Firefox (Stylo), Rust, etc.
